title: Baopuzi: The Master Who Embraces Simplicity
description: Ge Hong's defense of alchemy, longevity techniques, and the Taoist immortals — the most systematic early text on Chinese alchemy.
introduction: Ge Hong's defense of alchemy, longevity techniques, and the Taoist immortals — the most systematic early text on Chinese alchemy.

translation.text: Gold and cinnabar can transform the body. The sage who takes the great elixir will live as long as heaven and earth.
